summary: The notebook currently holds two notes: a foundational gradient-descent course note and a structured reading of the Transformer paper.

areas.label: Machine Learning
areas.coverage: Covers gradient descent basics: update rule, learning-rate intuition, and a worked one-step example on a quadratic.
areas.gap: No notes yet on momentum, Adam, second-order methods, or convergence theory.

areas.label: Deep Learning
areas.coverage: Covers the Transformer architecture: self-attention, multi-head attention, positional encodings, and WMT 2014 results.
areas.gap: No notes on CNNs, RNNs, diffusion models, or modern Transformer variants beyond this single reading.
